name: Dannel of the Tenth
title: High Priest of Yin
abilityName: Quantum Dissemination: Blessing of the Yin
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText:
Commit up to 3 infantry from your reinforcements to any non-home, non-legendary planets and resolve ground combats on those planets; other players cannot play action cards during this action.

Then, purge this card.

name: Ggrocuto Rinn
title: The King's Shield
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText:
At any time:

You may exhaust this card to ready any planet. Then, you may remove 1 of any player's ground force from a system adjacent to that planet.

name: Dirzuga Rophal
title: Peace Through Strength
abilityWindow: After another player activates a system that contains 1 or more of your units that have PRODUCTION:
abilityText:
After 1 or more other players place a command token in a system that contains 1 or more of your units with PRODUCTION:

You may produce 1 unit in that system with the reduced cost of 1.
unlockCondition: Have 12 ground forces on planets you control.

name: Emissary Taivra
title: The Azure Whisper
abilityWindow: After a player activates a system that contains a non-delta wormhole:
abilityText:
After a player activates a system that contains a non-delta wormhole:

You may exhaust this card. If you do, during this tactical action, for each type of wormhole present on the game board, you make players treat the active system as either containing that specific wormhole or as if it does not contain that wormhole.

name: Viscount Unlenn
title: The Dunlain Scourge
abilityWindow: At the start of a space combat round:
abilityText:
Before a player makes combat rolls:

You may exhaust this card to choose 1 non-fighter ship of that player; that ship rolls 1 additional die during this combat round. After this combat round, if any of that player's ships of that type produced at least 1 hit, that player gains trade goods equal to the number of their ships of that type in the active system.

name: Rear Admiral Farran
title: Sector XVIII Viceroy
abilityWindow: After 1 of your units uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE:
abilityText:
At the start of a space combat:

Place on this card a number of trade goods equal to twice the number of your non-fighter ships in this system. During this combat, each time 1 of your units uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE, you may gain 1 trade good from this card. At the end of the combat, discard all trade goods from this card.

name: Darktalon Treilla
title: Void Revenant
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText:
Place this card near the game board. The number of non-fighter ships you can have in systems is not limited by laws or the number of command tokens in your fleet pool during this game round.

At the end of that game round, gain 2 command tokens and purge this card. For each ship removed due to excess fleet, gain 1 trade good.

name: Magmus
title: Gashlai Tribune
abilityWindow: After you spend a token from your strategy pool:
abilityText:
Your war suns gain +1 capacity for each of your war suns and flagships on the game board and for each supernova that contains your units.

After you spend a token from your strategy pool:
You may gain 1 trade good.
unlockCondition: Have 2 war suns on the board.

name: Evelyn DeLouis
title: Master Tactician
abilityWindow: At the start of a ground combat round:
abilityText:
At the start of a ground combat round:

You may exhaust this card to choose 1 ground force in the active system; that unit rolls 1 additional combat die during this combat.

name: Claire Gibson
title: Voice of the People
abilityWindow: At the start of a ground combat on a planet you control:
abilityText:
During the Move Ships step, your ships may transport infantry from systems containing your command tokens, and you can land infantry on your planets along their movement path.

When you are the defender you may resolve 1 additional transaction with 1 neighbor of your choice.
unlockCondition: Control planets that have a combined total of at least 12 resources.

name: Sai Seravus
title: Gatewarden
abilityWindow: After your ships move:
abilityText:
Game effects cannot allow other players to move ships through a system containing your flagship unless you allow it.

After your ships move:

For each non-fighter ship that moved through 1 or more wormholes, you may place 1 fighter from your reinforcements with that ship.
unlockCondition: Have units in 3 systems that contain non-delta wormholes.

name: I48S
title: Enhancer Prodigy
abilityWindow: After a player activates a system:
abilityText:
After a player's BOMBARDMENT roll destroys 1 or more ground forces:

You may exhaust this card to allow that player to remove 2 of their infantry in the active system. If they do, they place 1 command token from their reinforcements in their strategy pool.

name: 2RAM
title: Integrated Systems Engineer
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText:
Game effects cannot prevent you from using BOMBARDMENT.

At the start of a space combat, if the number of planets in the active system is equal to or greater than the number of your dreadnoughts in that system, choose 1 of them to roll 1 additional die and to apply +1 to its roll results during this combat.

name: Suffi An
title: 90% Smuggler, 110% Energy
abilityWindow: After the Pillage faction ability is used against another player:
abilityText:
After the PILLAGE faction ability is used against another player:

You may exhaust this card; if you do, you and that player each draw 1 action card. Then, you may allow 1 of these players to explore 1 of their planets.

name: S'ula Mentarion
title: Everyone's "Best Friend"
abilityWindow: After you win a space combat:
abilityText:
After you win a space combat:

You may force your opponent to give you 1 promissory note and 1 action card from their hand, if able.
unlockCondition: Have 4 cruisers on the game board.

name: Ipswitch, Loose Cannon
title: Mercenary Raider
abilityWindow: At the start of a space combat that you are participating in:
abilityText:
At the start of a space combat:

You may purge this card; if you do, when your opponent's ships are destroyed during this combat, place matching ships of those types from your reinforcements in the active system. Your opponent cannot resolve abilities that would move ships during this combat.

name: Sh'val, Harbinger
title: Master of the First
abilityWindow: After you move ships into the active system:
abilityText:
After the Move Ships step of your tactical action:

You may purge this card; if you do, other players cannot play action cards during this action and you skip to the "Commit Ground Forces" step. Return each of your ships in the active system to your reinforcements. For each ship removed, produce 1 hit to the defender's ground forces.

name: T'ro
title: Tekklar Legionnaire
abilityWindow: At the end of a player's tactical action:
abilityText:
At the end of a player's tactical action:

You may exhaust this card. If you do, that player may place 2 infantry on a planet they control in the active system. If they don't, they may instead remove a number of infantry from the active system, equal to the number of tokens in their fleet pool, to remove their command token from that system.

name: Mathis Mathinus
title: Reclamation Executor
abilityName: Imperial Seal: Sins of the Father
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText:
After you perform the secondary ability of a strategy card:

You may purge this card to perform the primary ability of that strategy card.

name: Rickar Rickani
title: The Hand of the Emperor
abilityWindow: During combat:
abilityText:
During combat:

Apply +2 to the result of your flagship's combat rolls against a player holding the custodians token, if other than the Winnu.Apply +2 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls in the Mecatol Rex system, your home system, and each system that contains a legendary planet.
unlockCondition: Control Mecatol Rex or enter into a combat in the Mecatol Rex system.

name: Elder Qanoj
title: The Doom from Kklaj
abilityWindow: When you vote:
abilityText:
Each planet you exhaust to cast votes provides 1 additional vote.

Game effects cannot prevent you from voting on an agenda.

After a planet is readied during the action phase: 

You may move 1 of your units on that planet into coexistence on a planet in an adjacent system.
unlockCondition: Control planets that have a combined total of at least 12 influence.

name: Trrakan Aun Zulok
title: Strike Wing Commander
abilityWindow: When 1 or more of your units make a roll for a unit ability:
abilityText:
Your units in systems that contain your command tokens and are adjacent to the active system can make rolls for their unit abilities.

When 1 or more of your units make a roll for a unit ability:
You may choose 1 of those units to roll 1 additional die.
unlockCondition: Have 6 units that have ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE, SPACE CANNON, or BOMBARDMENT on the game board.
